title: calyptrospermum trifidum
intro: Calyptrospermum trifidum is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Myrtaceae, commonly known as the myrtle family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Calyptrospermum trifidum include reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and treating various infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
